title.rendered: AMI Welcomes Kelly Bryant as New Chief Product Officer

content.rendered:
AMI is pleased to welcome Kelly Bryant as its new Chief Product Officer, bringing his many years of experience and success in technology product marketing and management to lead global product planning and GTM initiatives for all AMI products – and to strengthen our position as a leading foundational technology company.

Kelly comes to AMI as a veteran of several top data center/storage and Cloud industry companies, serving in similar roles; as one of the drivers of AMI’s vision of transformation as a global leader in powering, managing, and securing the world’s connected devices, he and his team will define overall product vision and identify new technology, markets and opportunities for AMI.

“We are very excited to have Kelly join our senior leadership team to contribute his talent and skill set to our global product management and marketing strategy, working closely with us to help continue our work to transform the company and roll out new and innovative products over the coming months and years,” said Sanjoy Maity, Chief Executive Officer of AMI.
